metadata.scriptContent: matrix-gen-i18n src && pnpm i18n:sort && pnpm i18n:lint
cp src/i18n/strings/en_EN.json src/i18n/strings/en_EN_orig.json && pnpm i18n && matrix-compare-i18n-files src/i18n/strings/en_EN_orig.json src/i18n/strings/en_EN.json
pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:res && electron .
eslint --fix --max-warnings 0 src hak playwright scripts && prettier --log-level=warn --write .
pnpm lint:types:src && pnpm lint:types:test && pnpm lint:types:scripts && pnpm lint:types:hak

pnpm run hak --target x86_64-apple-darwin fetchandbuild && pnpm run hak --target aarch64-apple-darwin fetchandbuild && pnpm run hak --target x86_64-apple-darwin --target aarch64-apple-darwin copyandlink
pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:res && electron-builder --ia32
pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:res && electron-builder --x64
pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:res && electron-builder --universal
pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:res && electron-builder
rimraf webapp.asar dist packages deploys lib
matrix-gen-i18n src res && pnpm i18n:sort && pnpm i18n:lint
cp src/i18n/strings/en_EN.json src/i18n/strings/en_EN_orig.json && pnpm i18n && matrix-compare-i18n-files src/i18n/strings/en_EN_orig.json src/i18n/strings/en_EN.json
pnpm lint:types && pnpm lint:js && pnpm lint:style
